blocks.text: El Derbi Madrileño headlines a Sunday packed with unmissable football
Sunday delivers three must-watch clashes across two leagues, Hovland hunting at Valspar, and Norwegian riders racing Gent-Wevelgem. From Tyneside to the Bernabéu — buckle up.
⚽ Atlético Madrid vs Real Madrid — El Derbi with La Liga title stakes at the Bernabéu
⛳ Valspar Championship — Hovland & Reitan chase Sungjae Im who leads at -9
🚴 Gent-Wevelgem 2026 — Abrahamsen, Wærenskjold & Hoelgaard fly the Norwegian flag in Flanders
